name: widget-fullscreen
title: Widget Fullscreen Modal
description: Fullscreen widget modal: a deep, blurred backdrop scrim centring one large card (header bar with widget title + teal type tag + ✕ close, over a big scrollable body). Used when a dashboard widget is expanded to fill the screen. Open/close is a single is-open class toggle (fade scrim + lift-in card, mirroring the live fullscreenWidget()/closeFullscreen() pair); the close control carries hover, focus-visible and disabled states; backdrop-click and Escape also dismiss. A --contained modifier confines the plane to the gallery stage, and the body is a neutral placeholder so the partial stays decoupled from any widget renderer.
